{{Expand}}

{{Infobox technique
| name = Consuming
| introduced = Reaper
}}

== Reaper ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Consuming]] power is a fast way for [[Lindon]] to advance.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c7">''Reaper'', chapter 7</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Techniques]]
[[Category:Reaper]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
